svg.title: Spring Boot layered architecture
svg.desc: A three-layer Spring Boot architecture diagram showing Web/API layer, Service/Business layer, and Repository layer, with a database at the bottom and an external client at the top.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What HTTP methods does the API layer handle?')
sendPrompt('What annotations are used in the Spring Boot Web layer?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of the service layer in Spring Boot?')
sendPrompt('How does Spring Data JPA work in the repository layer?')
sendPrompt('What databases are commonly used with Spring Boot?')
